---
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    geometry: margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
editor: visual
---

```{r}
exam_display_title <- "SOC 106 Final Exam"
exam_display_date <- "May 11, 2026"
show_answers <- FALSE
source(here::here("assignments", "final", "final_exam_support.R"), local = knitr::knit_global())
```

{{< include final_exam_body.qmd >}}
